_comment: candidate_discovery mode schema. Merge with base.json at PLAN time.

task.repo: string — owner/repo target to search for issues
task.selection_required: boolean — must be true; a candidate must be selected before entering PR execution phases

candidate_discovery.candidates: array of {issue_number, title, url, score, rationale} — scored and ranked issues
candidate_discovery.selected_issue: object {issue_number, title, url, rationale} | null — null until user selects

transition_guards.selected → PLAN: candidate_discovery.selected_issue must be non-null and user must have confirmed selection
transition_guards.any → BLOCKED: candidate_discovery.status must be set to 'blocked' with reason in state.blocked_reason
